title: The Alliance Loses Ground
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the alliance loses ground, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as law's battle against Doflamingo reaches a breaking point, forcing Luffy and the others to rethink the rescue plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So, I full-well acknowledge Tora-Man's plan. We're to destroy the factory...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And let Dofla- Mingo live to see another day, so that we might use him further.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But... in terms of these guys who want to have their revenge on Dofla- Mingo today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is it really in our best inter- Ests to have him win against them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...Luffy, no matter what you say, I'm fighting with them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This country might look great at first glance, but it's hiding some really deep darkness!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: To challenge such powerful, underhanded enemy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, I can't just send them off to die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ehhh!!? We were hoping you wouldn't say that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: We'll join up as soon as we can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There's a huge fight going on in town!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What's going on there? What are we hearing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Hey!! Tora-man, why're you with Mingo...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: This brat... has pushed his luck far enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: One piece is on break next week!!!

summary: The Alliance Loses Ground focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law's battle against Doflamingo reaches a breaking point, forcing Luffy and the others to rethink the rescue plan.
